ship.noJournal: Ship journal not found (the GM must open the Holocron once).
ship.applyPlanned: Apply the planned route: {from} → {to} (−{days}d · −{fuel} fuel · +{usure}% wear)
ship.noPlanned: No route calculated in the Astronav.

deck.title: Holocron
deck.crewEmpty: Assign a character to each player (Configure Players).
deck.holonetEmpty: Create or edit the "{name}" journal to feed this panel.
deck.favEmpty: No favorites yet. Pin a world from its sheet (Monk's Enhanced Journal star).
deck.favToAstronav: Set as destination in the Astronav
deck.importHint: Import the planet compendium into the world journals (required for MEJ sheets and favorites).
deck.npcAdd: Add a character to the codex

tools.ffgOnly: Requires the Star Wars FFG system.

fear.title: Fear check
fear.rules:
Roll Cool or Discipline.
Failure: 1 strain + a Setback die until the end of the encounter · 3 Threat or 1 Despair: the character panics (GM's call) · Triumph: immune to this source for the scene.

crit.title: Critical injury
crit.noTable: Table not found: {name} (configurable in the module settings).

end.title: End of encounter
end.rules:
Strain recovery: roll Cool or Discipline (Simple difficulty) — each Success removes 1 strain, each Advantage may heal 1 strain on an ally.
Also remember: medical care (1 check/encounter), reloading Limited Ammo weapons, recovering committed Force dice.

init.noTokens: Select the tokens to add to combat.

destiny.title: Destiny Points
destiny.rules:
Players (light): upgrade 1 die of your pool · downgrade 1 opposing Difficulty die · activate certain talents · narrative nudge with GM approval.
GM (dark): upgrade the difficulty of a PC check · upgrade an NPC pool · trigger a narrative complication.
A spent point flips to the other side of the pool.

pr.absent: The "Party Resources" module is not active: the party pool stays in the ship journal.
pr.noApi: Party Resources API unavailable — open it once, then re-run the install.
pr.done: Party pool installed in Party Resources ({n} created).

shipJournal.name: Ship journal
shipJournal.hint: Name of the journal holding the party ship state (created automatically).

codexJournal.name: Codex journal
codexJournal.hint: Name of the journal holding allegiance, NPC alignment and points of interest.

holonetJournal.name: HoloNet journal
holonetJournal.hint: Name of the journal displayed in the Holocron HoloNet panel.

critTableCharacter.name: Critical table (characters)
critTableCharacter.hint: Name of the d100 critical injuries RollTable.

critTableVehicle.name: Critical table (vehicles)
critTableVehicle.hint: Name of the d100 critical hits RollTable.

resFoodId.name: Resource — Provisions (party-resources id)
resFoodId.hint: Id of the fvtt-party-resources resource tracking party provisions.

resFuelId.name: Resource — Fuel (party-resources id)
resFuelId.hint: Id of the fvtt-party-resources resource tracking fuel.

resWearId.name: Resource — Wear (party-resources id)
resWearId.hint: Id of the fvtt-party-resources resource tracking ship wear (%).

partyResMenu.name: Party pool
partyResMenu.label: Install into Party Resources
partyResMenu.hint: Creates (or resets) the Provisions / Fuel / Wear resources in Party Resources from the ship state.

systemFolder.name: System folder (technical journals)
systemFolder.hint: Name or uuid (Folder.<id>) of the journal folder where the Holocron's technical journals are stored (ship, codex, HoloNet, config, GM notes…). Created if missing.

installMenu.name: Holocron structure install
installMenu.label: Install / reinstall
installMenu.hint: Creates the key campaign folders, imports the Rules and Canon Events compendiums into the world and files the technical journals into the system folder. Safe: never recreates existing content.

configJournal.name: Configuration journal (web app)
configJournal.hint: Name of the journal holding the Archive Holocron config (flags.holocron.config). Must match CONFIG_JOURNAL_NAME on the web app side (default: ⚙️ Holocron Config). Created and completed automatically at install.

setup.done: Holocron installed: {folders} folder(s) created, {rules} rule(s) and {events} event(s) imported, {moved} journal(s) filed into “{sys}”.
setup.dupRemoved: Removed near-empty duplicate “{name}” (the real configuration is kept).
